nameEn: ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining

bestPapers.paperTitle: Fast and Memory-Efficient Tucker Decomposition for Answering Diverse Time Range Queries
All in One: Multi-task Prompting for Graph Neural Networks
Evaluating Decision Rules Across Many Weak Experiments

descriptionKo: KDD은 AI/ML 분야(Data Mining)의 주요 국제 학회입니다. 최근 acceptance rate는 18.7% (2025년, 552/2955편)입니다. 주요 연구 키워드: Graph, Efficient, Optimization, Diffusion, Benchmark. 매년 8월 개최. CCF A등급, CORE A*, BK21 4점.
descriptionEn: KDD is a leading international conference in AI/ML (Data Mining). Recent acceptance rate: 18.7% (2025, 552/2955 papers). Top research topics: Graph, Efficient, Optimization, Diffusion, Benchmark. Typically held in August. CCF rank A, CORE A*.
